edges.quote: The King in the North had heard many accounts of the Field of Fire as well. He knew that the same fate might await him if he tried to force a crossing of the river.
edges.note: S200 disposition: accounts of the Field of Fire moved Torrhen to kneel rather than fight

edges.quote: Finally the queen's flight took her to Sunspear, the ancient seat of House Martell, where she found the Princess of Dorne waiting in her abandoned castle.
edges.note: S200 disposition: the parley is a beat of the Conquest's Dornish campaign (parent corrected from conquest-of-dorne = Daeron I, 161 AC)
